PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?clubLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q11571 p:P54 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P54 ?club .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?startDate .
  ?club rdfs:label ?clubLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?clubLabel)) , "sporting"))
  .
  FILTER(LANG(?clubLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(!(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?clubLabel)) , "national")))
  .
}
ORDER BY ?startDate
LIMIT 1
